text: Natural Language Processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. One key application is text understanding, where computers can read and interpret written information. NLP also powers translation tools, allowing machines to convert text between languages like English and Spanish. Another important use is sentiment analysis, which examines the emotional tone of text, such as whether a review is positive or negative. Finally, chatbots rely on NLP to have conversations with people, answering questions and providing assistance. From translating documents to analyzing customer feedback, NLP is becoming an essential part of modern technology.
